requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — NTE INEN / IEC 62368-1 (120 V / 60 Hz, Type A/B plug)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — NTE INEN / IEC 62368-1（120V/60Hz，A/B型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — NTE INEN / IEC 62368-1（120V/60Hz，A/B型插頭）

summary.en: Electrical safety for audio/video, IT, and telecom equipment in Ecuador follows NTE INEN standards aligned with IEC 62368-1 (the consolidated audio/video, IT, and communications equipment safety standard). Ecuador operates at 120 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B plugs (same as the US). Chinese exporters whose products are already US-market-compliant (UL 62368-1 NRTL listed) have hardware that is electrically compatible, but NTE INEN safety compliance evidence must still be provided in the ARCOTEL homologación technical dossier. No direct equivalence with CCC (GB 4943.1) or UL listing is recognised by INEN.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔音视频、IT及电信设备的电气安全遵循与IEC 62368-1（整合型音视频、IT及通信设备安全标准）接轨的NTE INEN标准。厄瓜多尔采用120V/60Hz、A/B型插头（与美国相同）。面向美国市场已合规（UL 62368-1 NRTL认证）的中国出口商产品在电气上具备兼容性，但NTE INEN安全符合性证明仍须在ARCOTEL型式认证技术档案中提供。INEN不认可与CCC（GB 4943.1）或UL认证的直接等同。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾音視頻、IT及電信設備的電氣安全遵循與IEC 62368-1（整合型音視頻、IT及通信設備安全標準）接軌的NTE INEN標準。厄瓜多爾採用120V/60Hz、A/B型插頭（與美國相同）。面向美國市場已合規（UL 62368-1 NRTL認證）的中國出口商產品在電氣上具備相容性，但NTE INEN安全符合性證明仍須在ARCOTEL型式認證技術檔案中提供。INEN不認可與CCC（GB 4943.1）或UL認證的直接等同。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN (IEC 62368-1 equivalent — audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment safety)
Ecuador voltage standard: 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B plug

summary.en: CCC (3C) certification to GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 equivalent, or GB 4943.1-2022 transitioning to IEC 62368-1 alignment) is the mandatory Chinese electrical safety requirement for IT and telecom equipment. CN products are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz; those with universal 100–240 V / 50–60 Hz power supplies are electrically compatible with Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz mains. However, CCC is not recognised by INEN.
summary.zh: CCC（3C）认证（依据GB 4943.1，即IEC 60950-1等效，或向IEC 62368-1接轨的GB 4943.1-2022过渡版本）是中国IT及电信设备的强制电气安全要求。中国产品按220V/50Hz设计；配备通用100–240V/50–60Hz电源的产品与厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz市电电气兼容。但CCC不被INEN认可。
summary.zht: CCC（3C）認證（依據GB 4943.1，即IEC 60950-1等效，或向IEC 62368-1接軌的GB 4943.1-2022過渡版本）是中國IT及電信設備的強制電氣安全要求。中國產品按220V/50Hz設計；配備通用100–240V/50–60Hz電源的產品與厄瓜多爾120V/60Hz市電電氣相容。但CCC不被INEN認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 equivalent / IEC 62368-1 transitioning — IT and telecom equipment safety)
CCC (3C) Certification — mandatory for applicable product categories in China

gap.en: Partial gap: Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B environment is electrically advantageous for CN exporters with US-spec or universal-input hardware. IEC 62368-1 alignment is the technical bridge. However, NTE INEN compliance evidence must be presented in the ARCOTEL dossier; CCC (GB 4943.1) is not a recognised equivalent. Exporters with existing IEC 62368-1 test reports (e.g., from UL NRTL or CB Scheme) may be able to leverage them, but INEN/ARCOTEL acceptance must be confirmed.
gap.zh: 部分差距：厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz/A/B型环境对持有美规或通用输入硬件的中国出口商在电气上具有优势。IEC 62368-1接轨是技术桥梁。但NTE INEN符合性证明须在ARCOTEL档案中提供；CCC（GB 4943.1）不被认可为等同文件。持有IEC 62368-1测试报告的出口商（如通过UL NRTL或CB体系取得）或可加以利用，但须确认INEN/ARCOTEL的受理情况。
gap.zht: 部分差距：厄瓜多爾120V/60Hz/A/B型環境對持有美規或通用輸入硬件的中國出口商在電氣上具有優勢。IEC 62368-1接軌是技術橋梁。但NTE INEN符合性證明須在ARCOTEL檔案中提供；CCC（GB 4943.1）不被認可為等同文件。持有IEC 62368-1測試報告的出口商（如通過UL NRTL或CB體系取得）或可加以利用，但須確認INEN/ARCOTEL的受理情況。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NTE INEN electrical safety standards (IEC 62368-1 aligned) apply to IT, telecom, and IoT equipment in Ecuador. Ecuador's 120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B supply is advantageous for US-spec or universal-input Chinese products, but NTE INEN compliance evidence in the ARCOTEL dossier is still required; CCC is not a recognised substitute. Verify accepted test report formats with ARCOTEL and INEN before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NTE INEN电气安全标准（IEC 62368-1对标）适用于厄瓜多尔的IT、电信及物联网设备。厄瓜多尔120V/60Hz/A/B型供电对美规或通用输入的中国产品具有优势，但ARCOTEL档案中仍须提供NTE INEN符合性证明；CCC不被认可为替代文件。发货前请与ARCOTEL及INEN确认受理的测试报告格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NTE INEN電氣安全標準（IEC 62368-1對標）適用於厄瓜多爾的IT、電信及物聯網設備。厄瓜多爾120V/60Hz/A/B型供電對美規或通用輸入的中國產品具有優勢，但ARCOTEL檔案中仍須提供NTE INEN符合性證明；CCC不被認可為替代文件。發貨前請與ARCOTEL及INEN確認受理的測試報告格式。
